name: @aegis-v/browser
description: Aegis authorization engine for browser — check, write, delete permissions with full offline support
author: Aegis Authors

scripts.build:rust: cd rust && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir ../pkg && cd ..
scripts.build: npm run build:rust && npm run build:ts
scripts.optimize: wasm-opt -Oz -o pkg/aegis_browser_bg.wasm pkg/aegis_browser_bg.wasm || echo "wasm-opt not available, skipping"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run optimize
